mapper.select: SELECT holiday_id AS holidayId, holiday_date AS holidayDate, holiday_type AS holidayType, holiday_name AS holidayName, is_transfer AS isTransfer, transfer_date AS transferDate FROM holidays WHERE holiday_date LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '%') ORDER BY holiday_date

SELECT holiday_id AS holidayId, holiday_date AS holidayDate, holiday_type AS holidayType, holiday_name AS holidayName, is_transfer AS isTransfer, transfer_date AS transferDate FROM holidays WHERE holiday_id = #{holidayId}

SELECT holiday_id AS holidayId, holiday_date AS holidayDate, holiday_type AS holidayType, holiday_name AS holidayName, is_transfer AS isTransfer, transfer_date AS transferDate FROM holidays WHERE holiday_date = #{holidayDate}

SELECT holiday_id AS holidayId, holiday_date AS holidayDate, holiday_type AS holidayType, holiday_name AS holidayName, is_transfer AS isTransfer, transfer_date AS transferDate FROM holidays WHERE holiday_date >= #{dateFrom} AND holiday_date <= #{dateTo} ORDER BY holiday_date
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO holidays (holiday_date, holiday_type, holiday_name, is_transfer, transfer_date) VALUES (#{holidayDate}, #{holidayType}, #{holidayName}, #{isTransfer,jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{transferDate})
